task_completion.description: Navigate to the Import records screen in the Odoo Employees app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface showing the Employees app with the 'Import records' option selected (usually under Favorites ⚙️ -> Import records) or the 'Import a File' button visible.
The Odoo import screen showing the loaded data from the uploaded file, or a file selection dialog showing '/home/ga/Documents/new_hires.csv' being selected.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the correct Odoo fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The import mapping screen showing the Odoo Field dropdowns correctly set to 'Name', 'Work Email', 'Work Phone', 'Department', and 'Job Position' corresponding to the CSV columns.

task_completion.description: Successfully complete the import and verify the new employees are in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Employees kanban or list view showing the newly imported employees (Sandra Mitchell, Kevin Torres, Laura Chen, Marcus Johnson, Diana Ramirez) with their respective departments and job positions.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application running in a browser, rather than API calls or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo import feature rather than manually creating records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Import a File' screen and mapping interface, rather than the 'New Employee' form being filled out manually multiple times.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the Odoo database
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal is not used to run psql or python scripts to insert records into the database.
